items.title: June 14, 1990: Vinnie Johnson hits the game-winner with 0.7 seconds to go in Game 5, and the Pistons win their second-straight NBA Title with a 92-90 victory in Portland.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 14, 1990: Vinnie Johnson hits the game-winner with 0.7 seconds to go in Game 5, and the Pistons win their second-straight NBA Title with a 92-90 victory in Portland.

Johnson had 16 PTS off the bench, and Finals MVP Isiah Thomas scored 29 PTS (13-20 FG/3-3 3P) for Detroit.

items.title: Hollander POTD Dan Godfread. Evansville C was undrafted in 90. Signed w/MIN in December 1990 & stuck for the sseason but only played 20 minutes total (1.3 ppg 0.2 rpg).  Signed w/HOU but lasted a week before being waived ending NBA career. Played in minors & abroad from 91-00.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Dan Godfread. Evansville C was undrafted in 90. Signed w/MIN in December 1990 & stuck for the sseason but only played 20 minutes total (1.3 ppg 0.2 rpg).  Signed w/HOU but lasted a week before being waived ending NBA career. Played in minors & abroad from 91-00.

items.title: The Knicks just ended a 53-year championship drought.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks just ended a 53-year championship drought.

Yet we've spent the day settling scores with Becky Hammon, Luka Dončić and Jimmy Butler.

Those conversations flatten reality.

Sometimes it's OK to just appreciate what happened.

items.title: Wait for the some foolish team to prematurely give up on (or fail to pay) a really promising young player, then sign him. 🙃
items.author: Howard Beck
items.body_excerpt:
Wait for the some foolish team to prematurely give up on (or fail to pay) a really promising young player, then sign him. 🙃

Actual answer: Be smart, methodical and opportunistic. This Knicks team was actually built more like a mid- or small-market team than a big-market bully.

items.title: Total Net Points | NBA Playoffs
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
Total Net Points | NBA Playoffs 

An estimate of the players impact on the Spurs scoring margin over the course of the playoffs. 

View your favorite team here: espnanalytics.com/nba-award-le...

images.alt: MVP leaderboard ranking all ten San Antonio Spurs players by total Net Points, best overall. Victor Wembanyama leads with a trophy icon at +93.2. Dylan Harper is second at +37.0. Julian Champagnie is third at +33.1. Stephon Castle is fourth at +20.9. Devin Vassell is fifth at +19.7. Luke Kornet is sixth at +9.0. Harrison Barnes is seventh at -3.8. De’Aaron Fox is eighth at -7.3. Carter Bryant is ninth at -14.9. Keldon Johnson is tenth at -24.0.
